series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with tax payments to the State of Ohio for sales taxes, as well as tax payments to local government entities, and other related documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years after payment date. If paper records are scanned to an electronic format, the paper copies may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after payment date, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
